titleStmt.title: SII 38.553: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 553. (A.R. No. 553 of 1912.) TIRUNĪRMALAI, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPET DISTRICT. On the south wall, Nīrvaṇṇar shrine, Raṅganātha perumāḷ temple.

summary.p: This inscription contains a lot of mistakes, presumably engraved by an ignorant mason. In several places it is difficult to make out any meaningful reading.

In the Annual report of 1911-12 it is stated that the grant portion of this record commencing from lines 15-24 is formed a part of the No. 539. But a close examination of this portion reveals that it has nothing to do with the above inscription. The style of writing as well as the orthographical mistakes which the engraver committed in both the records i.e., the present record and the lines 15-24 attributed to A.R.No. 539 tempt us to connect these ten lines with the present one rather than with No. 539.
Begins with the meykīrtti of the ruler, Pūmālai miḍaṁdu etc;

It records the sale of land probably by a certain Kuḷattuḻāṉ Peruṅkāḍaṉ Vīravallān, with all its appurtenances and irrigation facilities, to the god of Tirunīrmalai. It is stated that the land was also freed from taxes such as antarāyam, nīrvilai, echchōṟu, kūṟṟunel etc.
Several persons, Veṇkāḍaṉ Sēndaṉ of Māndūr, Peruṅkāḍaṉ Villi of Kuḷattur and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī- hari . pūmālaimiṭaintu poṉmālai nikaḻttarap pāmālai miṭainta parumaṇin tiraṉpuyattiru nilamaṭaintaiyoṭu jayamakaḷ Iruppa+t taṉvarairāy mataṉateṉap peroḷiparappi
tirumakaḷeru taṉi Iruppa kalaimakaḷ coṟṟiṟam puṇarnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāvaka mimacai niḻa(r)ṟi(ti)caitoṟum tikiriyoṭu ceṅkol+tiruntupaṭa kaḷiyampapate taruḷi teṉṟicainta ce
kacu tiruppa Akila puṉaimun kavippator putumatipola veṇkuṭai+tte veṅkali(li)maṉ vilaṅkalmicai yeṟavum kali+tanarumamum tavamum tāṉamun taḻaippa vetamu meymaiyum Aṭamum
naṭappa karuṅ kaliyoḷittuvaṉ pilattiṭai kiṭappa kuḷattiṭai+tāṅki veṅkaimaṇṭalam tāṅkiṉi+yukamum rel+pala tiṟappa vantaruḷiya velaṟ karuma poṟpuliyāṉai pārutte
ṅkari pūmiyai kaṉaleri parukalam Aimpaṭaip paruvattu vempaṭai tivar cūṭa tirumaṇi makuṭam muṟaimayil cūṭam(e)ṉṉuyirkkel+ m maṉṉūret tā(ya)yoṭut taṉṉoṭuṉe
ḷiparappi taṉnaḷipparantu taṉkopaṟā koṟṟacaṟpuṟattu maṇi nāvoṭuṅkamuṉ kākaṉmu+maṅkavāḻi Ūḻi maraveṅkāttu tiramaṇip poṟareṭṭu veṭṭaiḻupatu tāṇṭi varumuṉ muṉne paṉivar cumantu tiṉa niṉattuc cori
nta cempoṟṟirukaiyāl taṇkulanāyaka tāṉnaṭampurinta cempoṉmaipalamMay be Read cempoṉṉampalamcūḻa tirumāḷikai kopūrāyataṟkūṭa cāraḷavum Ulakuvalaṅkoṇṭo+ṉ viḷaṅka nemik kulavarai Utaiya taṉṟontaṉ pacūmpoṉ potapalivarai maku
ṭamum vicūmmoḷi taḻaippa viḷaṅku poṉveyntu Iru nilantaḻaippa Imaiyavar taṉippa periya tirunāṭperumper viḻāvuraṉavar puraṭṭāti Uttiraṭṭāti+ampala niṟaintavaṟputaṟ cauttar Impar vāḻa Eḻuntaruḷuvataṟku ti
rutterk koyil cempoṉamaiyntu parutiraḷ muttiṉ payilvaṭam parappin nakai māḷikai neṭun tiruvitikaḷ tiruvaḷar peyarāl ceytu camaitaruḷa paiyapaṭunta mikka ponila mutamokamnṟem neṭukā Iḷi
cūṇeṉanu Aḷavilātaṉa vāḷi porccilai mātu pattā māṇṭir cittirai tiṅkaḷ Attam peṟṟa vātitta vārattu tiruvaḷamatiyiṉ kureretacippakka nāḷeṉṉa puliyum ruḷika naṉṟona leṭa niṭaṟku mukkulam mutan vi
ppa ceḻiyur veñu kaṟppaka ceralar kaṭalpāka ciṅkaḷaṟañci neñalamark kaṅkar tiṭaiyiṭak kaṉṉaṭar veṉṉiṭak koṅka+ṉetu
n koṅkaṇakāy maṟṟet ticai maṉṉārunta tamaraṇeru tirumalaṟ cevaṭorimaiyiliṉatu ca pātā maṭamayil parutalak karutti Aṇi
yac potaraṇamu naṭaiyuḷivar tiruvaṇamāvita karuḷiyiruppa cempoṉvarai ciṅkaṉava maṇāḷa puvaṉamuḻuṭu Uṭaiyāḷoṭum vaṉuruttaruḷiya konaṭppakka
pparakeca+paṅkaḷak kovirāca m tayāṉaruppa nirupa 8 jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu pulikuta koṭṭattuRead puliyūr koṭṭattu
kaḷattūr kāṭutāmpuṟattu vakai +veḷḷeḷaril mātuṭaiya nāṉa cenantum tuḷattuḻān meru ṭaṉ vāḻa cilavi palla vaṉattaiyem catuṉeṟūṭṭu peruṅkaṉal tirunirmalai Āḻvārkku tiruppaṭimāṟṟukku vaṭakkāka caṉaṭai parama tevaccaruppeti maṅkalattu kuṭippaḷḷi talimāṇiyuṅ kaṭampuraṉ tām Eṅkaḷ nilamāvatu ṅ koṭṭa kaṟvāyil kiḻakkaṭainta puncey nim vāḷ kiḻpārk
nilam moḻiviṉṟi viḷainilamum kolāl nilamum Itukku viṭṭa nirum niroṭu kālum pūtteri nirum Iṉṉilattu meṉokkiya maramum kiḻṉokkiya kiṇaṟum viṟṟamaik kuṟittu Ivarile palar koḷḷavaccār Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷ muṟṟum Āvaṇakkaḷiye kiḻikaic celakkoṇṭu viṟṟu vilaiyā
vomākavum nirvilai Antarāyameṉiy collap peṟātomākavum Iṉṉilattai cuṭṭi vanta Eccoṟuk kūṟṟunel cillirai veṭṭi muṭṭaiyāḷeṇu colla(la) peṟātomākavum Iṉṉilattitann Iṉṉila (u) Uḻaṅkuṭi makkaḷai Uppukkācu pervari Āḷamañciye
teri karaiyuṭpaṭṭa meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai paṟaiyarkuḻi teṉṉāruṟ matiḷukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai mātavaneri karaiykuṭpaṭa kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai cāmapurattu malaikku kotamaṉe nnellaikku nariviṭṭa nilam
vaṉtu celatu Ilmiṟ Innilamerpurattu Ariyappar kācavanu tiruvantippaṭṭaneṉ Iṉṉilam Iraiyiḻicci tiru Icaintaruḷa nilattile Eṟi Icaiyi
colla Aṟantoḷaṉ
kālāvatum viṟṟuk kuṭuttom mukkālāvatum niraṭṭi taṇ viṟpataṟku Itukku Ituve poruḷ māvaṟatip poruṭcelavolaiyen
tākavum mituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māva[ṟu*ti]p poruṭ celavolai kāṭṭeṉiṉṟu peṟātitāka Ippaṭikku Ituve kuḷattuḻāṉ peruṅkāṭaṉ viravallāṉ cayiñātaṉmaikku Ivai tinakaran vum Ipparicu Icaintu viṟṟu vilaiyā
tu kuṭuttom paraican Ūrku camainta kiḻ māntūruṭaiyāṉ veṇkāṭaṉcentaṉum kuḷattuḻaru peruṅkāṭaṉvilliyum Ivviruvom Ivarkaḷ veṇṭaveḻutineṉ ṉeruṭṭu pallavar paramāru vāṉavaṉmātevi kācapaṉtipanalān kāṇa kariya tevvāruṭaṉ
neṉ kiṉuranṉeḻān Ippaṭikku kiḻmāntūruṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ centeṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.553 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
